nasb.text: I will bless the Lord who has counseled me; Indeed, my mind instructs me in the night.

esv.text: I bless the Lord who gives me counsel; in the night also my heart instructs me.

cnv.text: 我要稱頌那指導我的耶和華， 我的心在夜間也勸戒我。

ccb.text: 我要称颂赐我教诲的耶和华， 我的良心也在夜间提醒我。

csbs.text: 我要颂赞那指教我的耶和华； 我的肺腑在夜间也警戒我。
